title: supplier_defect_heatmap.py output
description: Requires --supplier (always). No --component/--criticality arguments exist on this script — analysis is always component-level (x quarter), for the whole supplier across every component they touch. component_quarter_defect_rate mirrors exactly what the heatmap visualizes (same cells, same values), sorted by component_category then chronologically by quarter (parsed as (year, quarter_number), not the lexical string sort the original reference method used).

component.description: Always null — this script has no --component argument.

criticality.description: Always null — this script has no --criticality argument.

component_quarter_defect_rate.description: One row per (component_category, quarter) combination present in the supplier's data.

defect_count.description: Count of POs with has_md_event == True.
